name: Asparagus Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch fluted tart pan with pastry; trim the pastry to fit the top of the pan and prick it with a fork.
2. Bake the tart shell in a preheated oven at 450°F for 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
3. Meanwhile, cook the asparagus in boiling salted water just until crisp-tender, then drain thoroughly.
4. Remove the baked shell from the oven and reduce the temperature to 375°F.
5. Sprinkle the shell with Jarisberg cheese; top with well-drained asparagus and pimiento strips.
6. In a medium bowl, combine cornstarch, salt, and black pepper. Gradually stir in half-and-half until smooth.
7. Stir in eggs and Parmesan cheese until well blended; pour the mixture into the tart shell over the asparagus.
8. Bake at 450°F for 35 to 50 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
